title: Spicy Wholesome Mediterranean Baby Squid Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and light Mediterranean dish featuring tender baby squid, stir-fried with aromatic vegetables and spices. A perfect low-carb-friendly option for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality extra virgin olive oil

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped bell pepper and sauté for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes until the sauce starts to thicken.
Add the baby squid tubes, salt, and pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the squid starts to turn opaque.
Add the crumbled feta cheese and chopped fresh parsley. Stir well to combine.
Squeeze the freshly squeezed lemon juice over the squid and vegetables.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes until the squid is cooked through.
